calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOSEPH A SACRAMENTO FOR PLAINTIFF HELEN PETERSON. AGENT JASON SISCO PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY MARY CLAUGAS FOR DEFENDANT GRANT SMITH

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS:STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR PLAINITFF AGAINST DEFENDANT GRANT SMITH AND TO INCLUDE DEFAULTING DEFENDANT GUENTHER KROLL 1) FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 44 CRESTLINE DRIVE, #10 2)DEFENDANT TO VACATE ON OR BEFORE 12PM, 12/1/05. IF DEFENDANT VACATES PLAINTIFF TO FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 5 DAYS; 3)PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE ALL RENT DUE AND OWING AND PAY RELOCATION EXPENSES IN THE SUM OF $6500. $3000 PAID BY 10/24/05 AND $3500 BALANCE WHEN DEFENDANT VACATES. 4)DEFENDANT TO NOTIFY PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY 3 DAYS BEFORE MOVE OUT DATE.5)IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE, PLAINTIFF TO FILE, UPON 24 HOUR NOTICE,
EXPARTE APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR JUGMENT FOR POSSESSION, EVICTION, ALL RENTS DUE, AND FEES AND COSTS PERTAINING TO ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT.6) NO STAY OF EXECUTION 7) NO OTHER ADULTS ARE IN POSSESSION 8)MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS 9)PLAINTIFF TO RETAIN ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT, AND PROPERTY TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION 10)LEASE FORFEITED 11)AGREEMENT BINDS HEIRS 12) PLAINTIFF TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT AND LAST MONTHS RENT 13)DEFENDANT WAS ADVISED BY COUNSEL.
ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS. DEFENDANT SMITH DID NOT SIGN STIPULATION.

JUDGE PRO TEM:STEVE TAXMAN;CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER:ROBERT BALIAN (218)
